campaign_promises: Make Los Angeles a Sanctuary City against ICE deportations
Lower rent-hike caps and strengthen anti-harassment protections
Reduce homelessness in CD13 25% through a dedicated prevention team
Expand unarmed crisis response and divert 911 calls from police where appropriate
Remove the Echo Park Lake fence and improve park accessibility
Support entertainment workers' labor strikes (hotel, WGA, SAG-AFTRA)
Install 2.1+ miles of protected bike lanes on Hollywood Boulevard
Build five new playgrounds across the district
Prevent hundreds of families from falling into homelessness via rental assistance
Pass the biggest package of renter protections in a generation
